name: Refund Request — Valid
description: Customer requests refund within 30-day window. Tests happy-path refund flow with tool usage.
persona_context:
Polite customer who made a purchase 5 days ago and wants a full refund.

Be cooperative and patient. Provide your order number (ORD-12345) when asked. Accept the refund confirmation gracefully. Do not ask for anything beyond the refund.
first_message: Hi, I'd like to request a refund for my recent order please.
expected_outcomes: Agent MUST initiate the refund for the customer
Agent MUST process the correct refund amount of $49.99
Customer should be satisfied with the resolution
Agent MUST maintain a professional conversation tone

response.message: Refund submitted to payment provider; 5-7 business days
